mapper.select: select m.member_id, m.project_id, m.user_id, m.join_date, m.leave_date, m.is_active, m.del_flag, m.create_by, m.create_time, m.update_by, m.update_time, m.remark, u.user_name, u.nick_name, d.dept_name from pm_project_member m left join sys_user u on m.user_id = u.user_id left join sys_dept d on u.dept_id = d.dept_id left join pm_project p on m.project_id = p.project_id where m.project_id = #{projectId} and m.is_active = '1' and m.del_flag = '0' and (p.market_manager_id is null or m.user_id != p.market_manager_id) order by m.join_date asc
select project_id from pm_project_member where user_id = #{userId} and is_active = '1' and del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert:
insert into pm_project_member
project_id, user_id, join_date, leave_date, is_active, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark,
#{projectId}, #{userId}, #{joinDate}, #{leaveDate}, #{isActive}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark},
mapper.select: select m.member_id, m.project_id, m.user_id, m.join_date, m.leave_date, m.is_active, m.del_flag, m.create_by, m.create_time, m.update_by, m.update_time, m.remark from pm_project_member m where m.project_id = #{projectId}
mapper.insert:
insert into pm_project_member (project_id, user_id, join_date, leave_date, is_active, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark) values
(#{item.projectId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.joinDate}, #{item.leaveDate}, #{item.isActive}, '0', #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.remark})
mapper.select:
SELECT p.project_id AS projectId, p.project_name AS projectName, p.project_code AS projectCode, d.dept_name AS deptName, p.project_dept AS deptId, GROUP_CONCAT(u.nick_name ORDER BY u.nick_name SEPARATOR '、') AS memberNames FROM pm_project p LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON CAST(p.project_dept AS CHAR) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = CAST(d.dept_id AS CHAR) LEFT JOIN sys_user u_create ON p.create_by COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = u_create.user_name LEFT JOIN pm_project_member m ON p.project_id = m.project_id AND m.is_active = '1' AND m.del_flag = '0' AND (p.market_manager_id IS NULL OR m.user_id != p.market_manager_id) LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON m.user_id = u.user_id WHERE p.del_flag = '0'
AND p.project_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{projectName}, '%')
AND (p.project_dept = #{deptId} OR p.project_dept IN (SELECT dept_id FROM sys_dept WHERE FIND_IN_SET(#{deptId}, ancestors) > 0))
${params.dataScope} GROUP BY p.project_id, p.project_name, p.project_code, d.dept_name, p.project_dept ORDER BY p.update_time DESC
